return(function(...)local d={"\084\089\067\113\050\119\120\049","\051\072\107\111","\089\101\115\118";"\049\067\050\114\065\113\061\061";"\122\090\119\074\079\082\061\061","\110\097\111\122","\071\081\050\069\054\112\050\122\065\072\118\057\102\084\116\083\102\081\102\061","\104\074\077\100\108\066\121\087\104\065\113\061";"\050\054\078\079\084\081\048\067","\109\081\117\066\056\113\061\061";"\089\074\116\110\118\098\071\097\088\072\071\122\065\070\048\119";"\111\110\077\068\122\113\061\061","\107\050\087\119\101\066\075\112\070\066\068\087\089\113\061\061","\102\112\111\066\102\112\050\114","\054\108\116\088\116\084\050\075\067\082\061\061";"\099\075\086\086\068\085\050\098\080\081\070\106\077\071\067\084\069\082\053\082\121\082\061\061","\043\079\076\103\071\115\068\090\099\074\080\061","\053\119\101\122","\088\120\050\110\107\120\088\104\090\055\118\057\116\120\088\043\116\120\088\097\090\082\061\061";"\107\057\075\086\088\072\071\054\079\056\097\104\079\070\114\114\079\051\061\061","\116\112\111\104\065\098\079\103\102\067\079\057";"\070\081\088\079\065\055\085\081\049\056\088\072\082\098\079\047";"\107\055\079\054\082\067\102\106\071\108\050\054\118\055\079\047";"\106\073\070\077\075\043\070\105\053\116\082\081\097\101\101\051\072\105\119\068\053\082\061\061","\070\098\105\074\077\055\056\074","\082\114\071\104\102\067\117\057";"\100\109\043\099\088\109\100\074\075\049\050\122","\070\069\106\117\114\098\083\076\068\057\055\043\119\082\061\061","\102\081\057\114\071\082\061\061";"\086\051\061\061";"\049\120\088\066";"\107\056\050\066\071\120\111\110";"\120\047\087\109\050\105\087\087\114\114\097\061";"\090\052\122\079\106\078\075\077\082\103\061\061";"\052\069\102\114\078\112\076\088\049\073\051\061","\074\104\085\043\109\103\061\061","\082\112\111\119\049\098\090\084";"\116\120\050\069\049\120\070\061";"\113\105\067\083";"\051\117\065\074\049\057\067\083";"\089\065\098\114\080\083\101\104\101\109\065\075\057\099\084\099\085\085\100\071\050\043\119\104\054\103\080\108\084\103\089\115\070 end,function(r,l,M,P)local Y,C,m,v,n,b,Q,e,a,A,R,G,j,S,z,o,p,x,X,q,O,D,K,I,w,B,E,g,s,H,t,L,J,i while r do if r<931689+7020731 then if r<481128+3360064 then if r<-497500+(-378681+2826296)then if end,function(d,U)local T=C(U)local l=function(l)return r(d,{l},U,T)end return l end,function(d,U)local T=C(U)local l=function(l,M,P,k,t,W,s,h,q,C)return r(d,{l,M,P;k;t;W;s;h;q;C},U,T)end return l end,function(d)s[d]=s[d]-((1548324-(575172+337794))+-635357)if-855593-(-855593)==s[d]then s[d],W[d]=nil,nil end end,function(d)local U,r=-23732+23733,d[-258823+258824]while r do
